name: Breast Pump
description: Client is currently pregnant and due in mid 2026. She'd appreciate a breast pump to aid with nursing baby and also to prepare for heading back to work, it'd be easier with a breast pump. Client will be expecting her 4th child this year.

contact.org: MSF Social Service Office @ Woodlands, Sembawang
contact.name: Aryani Ramlan

passiton.name: Spectra breast pump + spare parts + 1 Baby Express handsfree pump & 1 S39 handsfree pump
passiton.description:
Would like to give away my Spectra breastpump that is more than 2 years old. no warranty and slight defect as it takes some tries to switch it on. comes with some accessories as well except the backflow parts. 

also blessing away 1 Babyexpress handsfree pump (no warranty) more than 2 years old. and 1 s39 breast pump that was a replacement for my old babyexpress (about a year old)
passiton.location: Bukit Batok , Bukit Panjang, Choa Chu Kang, Dairy Farm, Hillview

name: Bed with mattress
description:
Client is a single mother moving to a new rental flat with her 3 young children. Client is unemployed as she needs to provide care to her infant child.

The family requires a bed with mattress, ideally with in-build storage spaces. The bed can be either a double decker bed or king/queen-size bed.

contact.org: Fei Yue Family Service Centre @ Champions Way
contact.name: Eileen Yong

passiton.name: Loft bed with mattress
passiton.description: White wooden loft bed with mattress

name: single mattress
description:
The client is experiencing significant caregiving stress in managing her 16-year-old son alongside her 21-year-old son with special needs. The family is also facing financial constraints, as the client’s husband is the sole breadwinner with a limited income. 

Recently, the client’s 21-year-old son urinated on the mattress. The provision of super single mattress would greatly support the family by restoring a basic level of comfort and functionality in their home.

passiton.name: King Koil Single Headboard with Mattress
passiton.description: King Koil single bed frame and Simone mattress
